message:
fix(update): require explicit opt-in for empty stdin/file DESCRIPTION rewrites

Guard against accidental description blanking when a producer fails but
still pipes empty input into bd update. Empty DESCRIPTION replacement
from --body-file, --description-file, --stdin, and dash shorthand now
requires --allow-empty-description. Inline --description "" unchanged.

Closes #2713

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
